suggestions.name: MarkerRegistry

suggestions.name: AxisLocationRegistry

suggestions.name: DomainZoomHandler
suggestions.rationale: These overloaded zoomDomainAxes methods form a cohesive unit responsible for handling domain axis zoom operations, even though they implement no-op behavior for CategoryPlot. Extracting them into a Do
